mnemonics.title: NIST Cloud Characteristics
mnemonics.content: BRNOE (Like 'BURNOUT'): Broad network access, Resource pooling, Measured service, On-demand self-service, Rapid Elasticity.

mnemonics.title: Cloud Service Models
mnemonics.content: IPA Stack: IaaS (Infrastructure - bottom), PaaS (Platform - middle), SaaS (Software - top). You manage from the 'P' upwards in IPA.

mnemonics.title: Grid vs. Cloud Philosophy
mnemonics.content: Grid is for Collaboration (both start with 'C'), Cloud is for Commerce (both start with 'C').
